violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, fruit slicer, veggie dicer/slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Chicken was observed held at 116 - 132 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken was reheated to 165 degrees F and returned to hot hold unit. Hot hold temperature was increased, and temperatures are to be carefully monitored. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

(chicken) was observed held at ( 122 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken was re heated to 165 during inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

Small lowboy unit on service line was observed with an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Dressing in this unit observed with a temperature of 43 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call placed. Ice added to top wells (for the night shift) to decrease ambient to proper temperature. No TCS foods to be stored overnight in this unit until it has a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2023

One of the cutting boards observed to be very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
